enabled.name: Enable Fuzzy Search
enabled.description: When disabled, searches use the normal GD search.

result-limit.name: Result Limit
result-limit.description: Maximum number of results to fetch from GDHistory.

timeout-secs.name: Request Timeout (seconds)
timeout-secs.description: How long to wait for GDHistory before falling back to normal search.

name-weight.name: Name Weight
name-weight.description: How much the level name contributes to the fuzzy score.

creator-weight.name: Creator Weight
creator-weight.description: How much the creator name contributes to the fuzzy score. Useful for finding levels by a specific creator.

max-typos.name: Max Typos
max-typos.description: Maximum number of character substitutions allowed when scoring a match. Higher values are more forgiving of typos but may surface less relevant results.

query-variations.name: Query Variations
query-variations.description: Maximum number of query variations to search in parallel (deletions, word splits, transpositions). More variations find more typo results but increase API load.
